rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports only when they are explicitly declared in the AADL model.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only declared variables or constants from the same annex scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for structural assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes are for bindings.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or using subcomponent ports in type contracts.
Do not assume numeric types for event ports or opaque data types in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
